name: Scaleway
description: A cloud provider offering a comprehensive range of cloud services including compute, storage, databases, and more with a focus on sustainability.
longDescription:
Scaleway is a French cloud computing company that offers a wide range of infrastructure and platform services. Created in 2015 as a subsidiary of Iliad Group (the parent company of Free, a major French telecom), Scaleway has quickly established itself as one of Europe's innovative cloud providers.

The company is known for its developer-friendly approach, competitive pricing, and focus on environmental sustainability. Scaleway operates eco-designed data centers powered by renewable energy sources, with a commitment to reducing the environmental impact of cloud computing.

Scaleway offers a comprehensive suite of cloud services including compute instances, Kubernetes, object storage, databases, and serverless functions. As a European provider, Scaleway emphasizes data sovereignty and GDPR compliance, making it an attractive option for European businesses and organizations concerned about where their data is stored and processed.
